intent: Post-refactor audit of M-7C Grammar Refactor. The codebase was just refactored to use Codex-native morpheme names (Agentâ†’Seed, Patternâ†’Bloom, observerâ†’feedback, relationships renamed). Review the refactored code against these source documents: (1) codex-signum-v3_0.md for canonical morpheme definitions, (2) codex-signum-engineering-bridge-v2_0.md for implementation terminology, (3) docs/entity-mapping-v3.md for the rename mapping, (4) src/types/morphemes.ts for the type definitions.
